channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: New Gran Turismo In Development
item.content:encoded:
When you think of iconic racing franchises, it’s hard not to think of Gran Turismo. ‘The Real Driving Simulator’ has delivered on its promise for over 25 years, and Polyphony Digital is hiring for the next GT game.

If you grew up with any PlayStation console, chances are you’ve owned a Gran Turismo game at some point, or at least played one. Its excellent brand of simulated driving that has gotten better over the years, and looks so realistic you’d think you were in the car.

Polyphony Digital‘s Gran Turismo tinkering is not over.

Polyphony Digital Hiring For New Gran Turismo Game

There are 18 job listings at Polyphony Digital at the time of writing. There’s probably always one or two jobs going, but there might not be a better time to apply.

A translated message on the job page says this (presumably from Polyphony Digital Founder Kazunori Yamauchi):

“Gran Turismo” production team recruitment. It’s been 25 years since I started making Gran Turismo. The main reason we were able to keep making it was because of the players. I think this is proof that the work I continued to make so hard resonated properly. We are proud to have realized the ideas of the future as much as possible through art and technology. But I always think it’s still not enough to deliver the best experience to players…I want to create the future with art and technology. To those of you who have an insatiable desire to create. We look forward to your passion, technology, and ideas.”

There’s a giant headline under the message, which reads: “Now hiring staff for the production of ‘Gran Turismo.’” 

There are tester roles, CG Artist opportunities, and much more.

Knowing how long the development cycle of these games is now, it’s unlikely we’ll see the next Gran Turismo anytime soon, and it might be a smart bet to say it will only be playable on the PlayStation 6.

What are you hoping to see in Gran Turismo 8? Let us know through the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more news, check out the Starfield PS5 release date being confirmed, along with its prices and editions.

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: ARC Raiders Third Expedition Project Guide—Exact Expedition Window & Project Requirements
item.content:encoded:
Even though the second Expedition Window has slammed shut in ARC Raiders, the third Expedition Window is already looming overhead. The Rust Belt may be filled with freshly wiped accounts, but it’s never too early to start looking ahead towards the next wipe.

Of course, you don’t have to reset, but Embark Studios is actively working to improve the rewards and requirements in an effort to make the decision more appealing. By the time the third Expedition Window opens, it might be a no-brainer to wipe your account, so you’ll want to make sure you’re prepared.

Completing the Project is no quick and easy feat, so it’s best to get a head start. With that in mind, here’s when the third Expedition Window will open in ARC Raiders, and what you’ll need to complete the Project.

When Is ARC Raiders’ Third Expedition Window?

The third Expedition Window will open 58 days after the second one closed, so on April 29, 2026, meaning you’ve got until the end of April to complete the Expedition Project.

That’s almost two months from when the Project first becomes available, and if you didn’t complete the previous Expedition, you’ll still have whatever progress you made towards it saved from before. You can find the live countdown when you preview the Project in-game, so you can always stay up to date.

  • More Insider Gaming: Hurricane Map Condition, Explained

Once the Expedition Window has opened, raiders typically have around four to five days to confirm their departure. At this moment in time, Embark Studios hasn’t confirmed the dates yet, but assuming it sticks to the same schedule, expect the wipe to happen around May 3, 2026.

It might seem like that’s a lot of time to complete the Expedition Project, but be warned, you’ll need a lot of different resources if you want to finish it in time. It’s best to start sooner rather than later, as you might wind up missing the wipe and regretting it.

What Are The Requirements For The Third Expedition Project In ARC Raiders?

There are once again six stages to the Expedition Project in ARC Raiders, with each one having four requirements.

  • More Insider Gaming: ARC Raiders Map Condition Schedule

The items vary from materials to ARC parts, but the toughest stage is bound to be the fifth one, which requires you to sell 750,000 Coins’ worth of supplies! The Expedition won’t come cheap, but if you want to start completing it, here are all of the Project’s stages:

Will you be embarking on ARC Raiders’ next Expedition? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more ARC Raiders content, check out how to solve the Controlled Access Zone Button Puzzle on Dam Battlegrounds, as well as how to get Comet Igniters.
